# About TeleBots
Website: https://telebots.site
Company: TeleBots (ФОП Федонюк Роман Ігорович)
EDRPOU: 3831208275

## Services
- Telegram Bot Development (Aiogram, Pyrogram, Telethon)
- Website Development (Next.js, React, TypeScript)
- Chat Bot Development (AI-powered, GPT integration)
- CRM Integration (KeyCRM, Bitrix24, Salesforce)
- Payment Gateway Integration (Stripe, Monobank, WayForPay, LiqPay)
- Automation & Business Process Optimization
- SEO Services (on-page, technical SEO)
- E-commerce Solutions (Shopify, WooCommerce)

## Tech Stack
- Backend: Python (FastAPI, Flask), Node.js
- Frontend: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Databases: PostgreSQL, SQLite, MongoDB
- Infrastructure: Docker, Nginx, DigitalOcean, Vercel
- APIs: Telegram Bot API, WhatsApp, Viber, Nova Poshta, Monobank
